hints.title: Hint 1 — Iterative
hints.content: Keep track of three pointers: `prev`, `curr`, and `next`. On each step, reverse the `curr->next` pointer to point to `prev`, then advance all three pointers forward.

hints.title: Hint 2 — Recursive
hints.content: Assume the rest of the list beyond the current node is already reversed. The current node's `next->next` should point back to the current node. Then set `current->next = null` to avoid a cycle.
